parameters.text:
=Tell me if the internet is up.  If you see successful pings from the output below, that means it's good.  Tell me in a funny way, impersonating Eddy Murphy.

 {{ $json.output }}

parameters.content:
=Here is how the internet is doing:

{{ $json.text }}

json.creator: Unknown
json.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows

json.creator: Paresh Dave, Lauren Goode, Steven Levy, Zoë Schiffer
json.title: Meta’s New Reality: Record High Profits. Record Low Morale
json.author: Paresh Dave, Lauren Goode, Steven Levy, Zoë Schiffer
json.content: Next week, Meta is cutting about 10 percent of its staff. WIRED spoke with more than a dozen current and former employees about what it's like inside a company where "everyone is unhappy."
json.contentSnippet: Next week, Meta is cutting about 10 percent of its staff. WIRED spoke with more than a dozen current and former employees about what it's like inside a company where "everyone is unhappy."

json.creator: Asif Razzaq
json.title: Nous Research Releases Token Superposition Training to Speed Up LLM Pre-Training by Up to 2.5x Across 270M to 10B Parameter Models
json.author: Asif Razzaq
json.content: Nous Research releases Token Superposition Training (TST), a two-phase pre-training method that cuts wall-clock training time by up to 2.5x at matched FLOPs by averaging contiguous token embeddings into bags during Phase 1 and reverting to standard next-token prediction in Phase 2 — without changing the model architecture, tokenizer, optimizer, or inference-time behavior. Validated at 270M, 600M, 3B dense, and 10B-A1B MoE scales. The post Nous Research Releases Token Superposition Training to Sp
json.contentSnippet: Nous Research releases Token Superposition Training (TST), a two-phase pre-training method that cuts wall-clock training time by up to 2.5x at matched FLOPs by averaging contiguous token embeddings into bags during Phase 1 and reverting to standard next-token prediction in Phase 2 — without changing the model architecture, tokenizer, optimizer, or inference-time behavior. Validated at 270M, 600M, 3B dense, and 10B-A1B MoE scales. The post Nous Research Releases Token Superposition Training to Sp

json.creator: Asif Razzaq
json.title: Fastino Labs Open-Sources GLiGuard: A 300M Parameter Safety Moderation Model That Matches or Exceeds Accuracy of Models 23–90x Its Size
json.author: Asif Razzaq
json.content: Fastino Labs has released GLiGuard, a 300M parameter open-source safety moderation model that evaluates four safety tasks — prompt safety, jailbreak strategy detection, harm category classification, and refusal detection — in a single forward pass. Built on an encoder architecture rather than the decoder-only design used by most guardrail models, GLiGuard achieves up to 16x higher throughput and 16.6x lower latency than current state-of-the-art models, while matching or exceeding the accuracy of
json.contentSnippet: Fastino Labs has released GLiGuard, a 300M parameter open-source safety moderation model that evaluates four safety tasks — prompt safety, jailbreak strategy detection, harm category classification, and refusal detection — in a single forward pass. By combining Pulse AI's advanced document understanding capabilities with the powerful AI services of Amazon Bedrock, organizations can achieve enterprise-grade accuracy and extract contextually relevant financial insights at scale.

json.creator: Zihang Huang
json.title: Build real-time voice streaming applications with Amazon Nova Sonic and WebRTC
json.author: Zihang Huang
json.content: Building end-to-end live streaming applications with real-time voice interaction presents several challenges. This post introduces a solution based on Amazon Nova 2 Sonic (Nova Sonic) and Amazon Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC (WebRTC) that addresses these challenges. In this post, we’ll walk through the solution architecture, implementation patterns, and two real-world scenario examples.

This post introduces a solution based on Amazon Nova 2 Sonic (Nova Sonic) and Amazon Kinesis Video Streams WebRTC (WebRTC) that addresses these challenges. In this post, we’ll walk through the solution architecture, implementation patterns, and two real-world scenario examples.

json.contentSnippet: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

json.text:
(in Eddy Murphy's voice)

 Ahh, ah! Let me tell you somethin'. I got the scoop on the internet. And I'm here to break it down for you. (chuckles)

Okay, okay, okay. I'm lookin' at the stats here. And I'm seein' some good stuff. You got four successful pings, that's like gettin' four A's on a test, baby! (laughs) You're killin' it!

Now, let me tell you what these numbers mean. (clears throat) You got a round-trip time of 9.479 milliseconds, 11.650, and 15.452. That's like me runnin' from the law, minus the drama and the handcuffs. (laughs) It's fast, it's smooth, it's like silk, baby!

And the packet loss? Zero! That's like me at a buffet, eatin' all the free food and not gettin' caught. (laughs) You're gettin' all the data you need, nothin' gettin' lost in translation.
